category.scope_note: Electric vehicle conductive charging equipment comparison — China export to South Africa.

title.en: China-to-South Africa EV Charger Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩进入南非：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁進入南非：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China EV charger documentation against South Africa NRCS Letter of Authority review where applicable, SANS/IEC 61851 EV charger safety, IEC 62196 Type 2 and CCS2 connector expectations, NRS grid-connection practice, EMC evidence, and China GB/T 18487 baseline evidence.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动汽车充电桩文件与南非适用时的NRCS授权书审查、SANS/IEC 61851充电设备安全、IEC 62196 Type 2和CCS2接口预期、NRS并网实践、电磁兼容证据及中国GB/T 18487基线证据差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動汽車充電樁文件與南非適用時的NRCS授權書審查、SANS/IEC 61851充電設備安全、IEC 62196 Type 2和CCS2接口預期、NRS併網實務、電磁相容證據及中國GB/T 18487基線證據差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, NRCS scope ruling, Letter of Authority approval, electrical-installation design, grid-connection approval, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, designers, and installers should verify current South African compulsory specifications, NRCS LOA practice, SANS standards, NRS grid requirements, municipal connection rules, and customs requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、NRCS适用范围裁定、授权书批准、电气安装设计、并网批准、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、设计方和安装方在出货或安装前，应与合格专业人士核验现行南非强制规范、NRCS LOA实践、SANS标准、NRS电网要求、市政接入规则及海关要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、NRCS適用範圍裁定、授權書批准、電氣安裝設計、併網批准、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、設計方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行南非強制規範、NRCS LOA實務、SANS標準、NRS電網要求、市政接入規則及海關要求。

answer_first.en: For China-made EV chargers entering South Africa, the confirmed gaps are South Africa-specific NRCS LOA scope review where the charger or its components fall under compulsory electrotechnical specifications, SANS/IEC 61851 safety evidence, Type 2 or CCS2 connector strategy rather than GB/T 20234, local NRS or municipal grid-connection requirements, and EMC evidence suitable for the intended installation. Do not treat China GB/T 18487 or GB/T 20234 reports as automatic South Africa market access.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造电动汽车充电桩进入南非时，已确认的主要差距包括：充电桩或其部件落入强制电工规范时需进行南非NRCS LOA适用范围审查；需准备SANS/IEC 61851安全证据；接口策略应面向Type 2或CCS2而非GB/T 20234；需满足当地NRS或市政并网要求；并准备适合目标安装场景的EMC证据。不应将中国GB/T 18487或GB/T 20234报告视为自动获得南非市场准入。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造電動汽車充電樁進入南非時，已確認的主要差距包括：充電樁或其部件落入強制電工規範時需進行南非NRCS LOA適用範圍審查；需準備SANS/IEC 61851安全證據；接口策略應面向Type 2或CCS2而非GB/T 20234；需滿足當地NRS或市政併網要求；並準備適合目標安裝場景的EMC證據。不應將中國GB/T 18487或GB/T 20234報告視為自動獲得南非市場准入。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, municipal electricity authority, customs authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
